title: Alan Kupperberg
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Alan Kupperberg''' ([[May 18]], [[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[July 16]], [[2015]]) was a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] writer and artist who worked on a few issues of [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel's ''Star Wars'']] comic series. He began his comic career in 1977 for [[Marvel Comics]], producing such titles as [[Wikipedia:Amazing Spider-Man|''Amazing Spider-Man'']], [[Wikipedia:Incredible Hulk|''Incredible Hulk'']], and [[Wikipedia:Captain America|''Captain America'']]. Since then Kupperberg worked for a number of publishers including [[Wikipedia:Archie Comics|Archie Comics]] and [[Wikipedia:National Lampoon|National Lampoon]] and did a number of advertising and design projects.{{Mediacat|imagecat=images by Alan Kupperberg}}
